verification.notes: Browser-assisted compact snapshot captured from https://www.metmuseum.org/exhibitions on 2026-07-15 after direct backend fetches remained unsuitable for this source. This is staging-only and requires human review against the live official page before promotion.

stagingNotes: Official Met featured, recently opened, closing soon, more temporary, and upcoming exhibition cards from a browser-assisted compact snapshot, plus explicit official detail-page seed fixtures for known missing exhibitions. Direct automated backend fetch is currently blocked by Vercel 429, so this source is not a fully automated live ingestion path.
